data.body: Investigation: .pyc files under plugins/dso/scripts/__pycache__/ were local disk artifacts, NOT tracked in git. .gitignore already excludes both *.pyc (line 1) and __pycache__/ (line 5). The pre-commit hook (check-plugin-self-ref.sh) only scans staged files matching ^plugins/dso/, so untracked .pyc files cannot trigger it. Fix: deleted the stale __pycache__/ directory from disk. No git changes needed.
